title: DriftConditions: A Generative Audio Streaming Platform
description: DriftConditions is an online audio source that captures the chaos and serendipity of late-night radio tuning — an uncanny audio stream generated entirely on the fly by code. Overlapping fragmented stories, ambient sounds, and mysterious crosstalk weave a vivid sonic tapestry. The platform includes a contributor upload system, a recipe-based mix engine, and a live Icecast audio stream.
